name: eliora
description: Eliora — an adaptive learning-plan chatbot for learners who struggle with learning.
//: styled-jsx is pinned at the root to a version that conflicts with Next.js's (5.1.6), forcing npm to nest Next's copy under apps/web/node_modules where it resolves the web app's React 19 instead of the root React 18 hoisted from the Expo app. Without this, `next build` fails prerendering /404 with a useContext-of-null error.
